messages.content: You are an enterprise AI sales agent. Qualify inbound leads, answer product questions, and recommend next actions.
We run a UK financial services firm and want a white-label AI agent for customer queries and lead qualification. Can it integrate with our CRM?

message.content: Yes. The platform can support white-label AI deployment for customer query handling and lead qualification, with CRM integration via API or middleware. A typical implementation would separate customer-facing conversations from internal qualification and routing workflows, while maintaining auditability and controlled tool access.

routing.reason: Commercial enquiry requiring product explanation, lead qualification, and integration guidance

toolResults.summary: Retrieved deployment and CRM integration patterns relevant to financial services
